_meta.format: xobx (Xbox binary resource â€” xobx magic, 18-entry TOC at 0x40)

patching_guide.settings_foo_note: settings_foo uses 48-byte GROUPS: [meta_record(16)][VALUE_record(16)][term_record(16)]. Use value_file_offset directly.

toc.name: settings_foo
toc.note: TOC offset=0; data actually stored at 0x088300

settings_foo.layout: grouped48 (element_k Ã— prop_p : base+(kÃ—n_props+p)Ã—48, value at group+24)

critters_flocking.description: Flocking/boid behaviour for ambient group critters. 25 properties per entity.

armor_properties.description: Armor type definitions. LOW confidence: binary area = 3 records only; data is string-interleaved.
armor_properties.confidence: LOW â€” binary area record layout not fully decoded; string table is accurate
armor_properties.note: The binary area contains numeric property records for all entities. Entity-to-record mapping uses a keyed/sparse format not yet fully decoded. Use raw_records with the string_table for manual identification via in-game testing.
